description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint and a modern, clean-lined exterior. The facade is clad in blue-gray siding with white trim around the windows and doors, giving it a crisp, contemporary look. The front features a small porch with steps, flanked by manicured shrubs and a pathway leading to the entrance. Multiple windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The roof is flat, with a slight parapet, and the landscaping includes several ornamental trees and bushes. The rear of the house has a modest deck or patio area, suggesting outdoor living space.
description: A modern two-story house with blue-gray siding, white trim, flat roof, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by ornamental trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with porch, steps, and symmetrical landscaping including shrubs and purple-leaved trees.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flat roof, window arrangement, and side landscaping with trees and bushes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a deck or patio area, more shrubs, and the back door, with windows on both floors.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the flat roof, window placement, and additional landscaping with trees and bushes.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and flanking shrubs; simple, modern design with minimal ornamentation.
